title: I-Fly
summary: I-Fly is a Russian charter airline based in Moscow operating mainly out of Vnukovo International Airport. It flies all services on behalf of Russian tour operator TEZ Tour. It is currently banned from flying in the European Union airspace.
text:
I-Fly is a Russian charter airline based in Moscow operating mainly out of Vnukovo International Airport. It flies all services on behalf of Russian tour operator TEZ Tour. It is currently banned from flying in the European Union airspace.

Destinations
I-Fly destinations:

Fleet
As of August 2025, I-Fly operates the following aircraft:

Air Lease Corporation are seeking to recover four Airbus A330s, as the lease payments are not being made.
The airline fleet previously included the following aircraft:

2 Airbus A319-100
1 Boeing 757-200 (as of November 2015)
